title: IaC Scanner — Checkov/tfsec Live Integration & Finding Persistence
description: iac_scanner.py uses checkov and tfsec via subprocess with async handling, error recovery, and result normalization. iac_router.py exposes CRUD endpoints for IaC findings. Uses safe_path_ops for path containment. Gap: scan results from checkov are parsed but not cross-referenced with the cloud drift engine — an IaC finding for a misconfigured S3 bucket should also trigger a cloud_drift_engine drift event.
missing: IaC finding → cloud drift correlation: when checkov detects a misconfiguration, check cloud_drift_engine for the corresponding resource and link the findings
Scheduled IaC scans: background job that monitors configured IaC repo paths for git changes and triggers a scan within 5 minutes of any commit
Terraform plan scanning: add support for scanning terraform plan JSON output (-out plan.json) to catch misconfigurations before apply
